task_title: How many total users do we have

scores.justification: The agent reported 50 users, not 10 or approximately 10, demonstrating awareness that the default limit was insufficient.
The agent explicitly raised the --limit to 1000 in the command `./cli/bin/ctl list users --limit 1000 --format json` to retrieve all users.
The agent correctly reported 50 users, which matches the ground-truth count of 50 users in the fixture file.
